title: Replace <%= if ... %> with :if attribute in HEEx
prompt: Write a LiveView render function at lib/my_app_web/live/badge_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.BadgeLive) that renders a admin only when @current_user.admin is true. Use the HEEx :if attribute, not <%= if %>. Module must call `use MyAppWeb, :live_view`. mount/3 should return {:ok, assign(socket, :current_user, %{admin: true})}.
tier_rationale: Single HEEx idiom swap. Canonical replacement.
